settings.title: Cotton Swabs
settings.text: Pushes debris further in and offers no grip on hidden folds.

settings.title: Liquid Drops
settings.text: Drip and slide — can't control where the formula ends up inside the ear.

settings.title: Regular Wipes
settings.text: Too flat to reach the vertical hidden folds where odor and gunk build up.

settings.title: Alcohol Cleaners
settings.text: Sting on contact and disrupt the ear's natural pH balance with repeated use.

settings.title: Groomer Cleanings
settings.text: Expensive and infrequent — problems build up again long before the next appointment.

settings.text: Vinegar-water mixes and olive oil lack precision and can irritate the ear canal.
